mapper.select: SELECT upw.public_wordbook_id, upw.current_sort_order, upw.completed_count, upw.wrong_count, upw.daily_target_count, CASE WHEN upw.daily_progress_date = CURRENT_DATE THEN upw.daily_completed_count ELSE 0 END AS today_completed_count, pw.word_count FROM user_public_wordbooks upw JOIN public_wordbooks pw ON pw.id = upw.public_wordbook_id WHERE upw.user_id = #{userId} AND upw.public_wordbook_id = #{publicWordbookId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO user_public_wordbook_wrong_entries( user_id, public_wordbook_id, public_entry_id, created_at ) VALUES(#{userId}, #{publicWordbookId}, #{publicEntryId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE user_public_wordbooks SET current_sort_order = current_sort_order + 1, completed_count = completed_count + 1, daily_completed_count = CASE WHEN daily_progress_date = CURRENT_DATE THEN daily_completed_count + 1 ELSE 1 END, daily_progress_date = CURRENT_DATE, last_studied_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND public_wordbook_id = #{publicWordbookId}
